source.rightsStatus: Project-provided source material; provenance documentation remains to be finalized.

notes: Chapter is the fine-grained curriculum order; the three application tiers are derived chapter bands.
Learner-facing Spanish is separated from the canonical lemma and source forms.
Stem changes, required prepositions, reflexivity, irregular forms, and related notes are retained as structured grammar metadata.
Repeated Spanish prompts are merged for fair multiple-choice questions; distinct source glosses are retained in the senses array.
The former 1,500-entry testing vocabulary remains in the repository as possible future supplementary material but is no longer active.
